title: Paltiy #6406
definition:
Palti or Phalti = "my deliverance"

 1) son of Raphu, the spy chosen from the tribe of Benjamin
 2) son of Laish, the man to whom king Saul gave his daughter Michal in
     marriage even though she was already married to David
nasbUsage:
